title: anthurium × kellerianum
intro: Anthurium × kellerianum, also known as the veitchii anthurium, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Arum family (Araceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of anthurium × kellerianum include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis. Herbal preparations of anthurium × kellerianum, including infusions and tinctures, are sometimes used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
